headline: Is Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CEG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Constellation Energy Corporation on Darius Dark Investing’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CEG. Constellation Energy Corporation’s share was trading at $251.65 as of June 9th. CEG’s trailing and forward P/E were 21.86 and 21.37 respectively according to […]
